notes: Generated projects may declare checked-in team-shared presets here.
Leave sanctionedAdditionalProfiles empty until the project intentionally commits a shared preset under env/*.json.
Sanctioned checked-in profiles must not keep smoke/xunit/bdd as success-on-placeholder contours.

Checked-in smoke/xunit/bdd commands must use unsupportedReason or direct repo-owned entrypoints in command[0] (or make project-smoke), not shell wrappers, inline snippets, or trivial success commands.
Repo-owned verification entrypoints may rely on launcher-provided ONEC_* env metadata documented in env/README.md.
